name: git-bash-executor
description: Run Codex development commands through Git Bash on Windows.

interface.shortDescription: Run Windows development commands in Git Bash.
interface.longDescription: Adds a local MCP tool that executes Git, build, test, and search commands through Git for Windows Bash with explicit working directories, timeouts, bounded output, and structured results.
defaultPrompt: Run the project checks using Git Bash.
Use Git Bash for all development commands in this task.
